seo.title: Neuvillette Build Guide — GenshinGuide
seo.description: Complete Neuvillette build guide for Genshin Impact v5.6. Best weapons ranked (Tome of the Eternal Flow, Prototype Amber), optimal artifacts (Marechaussee Hunter), team compositions, and rotation guide.

tldr_weapon: Tome of the Eternal Flow (F2P: Prototype Amber R5)
tldr_artifact: 4pc Marechaussee Hunter (HP%/Hydro or HP%/CRIT DMG or HP%)
intro: Neuvillette is one of the strongest on-field Hydro DPS characters in Genshin Impact. His charged attack beam deals continuous AoE damage that scales entirely with HP — not ATK. With 4pc Marechaussee Hunter providing 36% free CRIT Rate, you can stack CRIT DMG to absurd levels. This guide covers everything you need to build him optimally in v5.6.
weapon_bottom_line: Tome of the Eternal Flow is his signature and BiS. Prototype Amber R5 is shockingly close — and craftable for free. Only pull signature if you want to min-max.

weapons.name: Tome of the Eternal Flow
weapons.notes: Signature. HP manipulation = extra CA DMG. Massive CD stat stick.

weapons.name: Prototype Amber R5
weapons.notes: Best F2P. HP% substat + energy refund + team heal. Rivals 5-stars!

weapons.name: Sacrificial Jade R5
weapons.notes: Battle Pass. Huge HP buff after 5s off-field. Requires rotation discipline.

artifact_why: Neuvillette's charged attack constantly drains and heals his own HP, triggering Marechaussee's 36% CRIT Rate bonus effortlessly. This frees you to stack CRIT DMG to 250%+ while maintaining a 1:2 ratio. With his HP-scaling, this set is essentially custom-made for him.
artifact_alt: 4pc Heart of Depth (if you haven't farmed Marechaussee yet). 2pc HP% + 2pc Hydro DMG (transitional build).

main_stats.sands_note: Always HP%. His entire kit scales from HP — ATK is useless on him.
main_stats.goblet_note: Hydro DMG is ~3-5% better. HP% goblet is extremely close with Furina + Kazuha buffs.
main_stats.circlet_note: CRIT DMG usually best. With MH set, aim for 64% CR (100% effective). HP% circlet viable with high CD subs.

sub_priority: CRIT Rate / CRIT DMG (aim for 64% CR with MH set, rest into CD)
Energy Recharge (120-140% comfortable, less with Prototype Amber or double Hydro)

teams.name: Team 1: Neuvillette Hypercarry
teams.desc: Neuvillette · Furina · Kazuha · Baizhu. His premium team. Furina provides massive DMG% and enables his A1 passive. Kazuha VV shred + grouping. Baizhu provides shields and healing for Furina stacks. Highest ceiling.

teams.name: Team 2: Budget Freeze/Hypercarry
teams.desc: Neuvillette · Fischl · Sucrose · Zhongli. Zhongli shield is essential at C0 for interruption resistance. Fischl provides consistent electro application and off-field damage. Sucrose provides VV shred and EM/grouping.

teams.name: Team 3: Taser (Electro-Charged)
teams.desc: Neuvillette · Fischl · Beidou · Kazuha/Sucrose. Double Electro for particle generation. Beidou's burst chains through Neuvillette's charged attack beam. High AoE damage and stagger resistance.

teams.name: Team 4: Hyperbloom Driver
teams.desc: Neuvillette · Nahida · Raiden (Full EM) · Flex (Zhongli/Baizhu). Neuvillette drives hyperblooms with sustained Hydro application. Raiden triggers from off-field. Extremely high floor damage with minimal investment.

rotation_code: Neuvillette E → Furina E Q → Kazuha E (tap) Q → Baizhu E Q → Neuvillette CA (hold) → Q → E → CA (hold) × 2 → Repeat
rotation_key: ⚠️ Use Neuvillette's E first to generate Sourcewater Droplets. After supports, hold CA to absorb droplets for instant beam. At C1+, you can use 2 charged attacks without re-setup.
mistakes: ❌ Building ATK on Neuvillette. His entire kit scales with HP. ATK% sands, ATK% substats, and ATK-buffing weapons (except his signature which has CD) are dead stats on him.
❌ Running C0 without a shielder. Neuvillette's charged attack beam can be interrupted by any hit. At C0, you must run a shielder or you will lose significant DPS from canceled beams.

❌ Not triggering all 3 Hydro-related reactions. Neuvillette's A1 passive gives up to 160% CA DMG bonus when 3 different Hydro reactions occur. Build teams that trigger at least 2-3 different reaction types.

❌ Underestimating HP% goblet. With Furina + Kazuha providing massive DMG% buffs, HP% goblet can outperform Hydro DMG goblet if it has better substats. Don't auto-trash HP% goblets with good CRIT rolls.
